headline: Agentic tooling pushed toward autonomous local execution this month, with NotebookLM and Gemma both moving from assistants to self-directed builders.
body: The dominant move is agents going fully autonomous: NotebookLM gained a cloud computer that writes code, builds sources, and delivers finished outputs on its own, while Gemma 4 26B ran 10 parallel subagents under a single orchestrator entirely on one local machine above 170 tokens per second. Local models broke out alongside this shift, and agentic SEO workflows that wire Claude Code into Google Search Console data to generate and deploy content surfaced as a concrete application. A separate cluster of resilience techniques broke out as new entrants: data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection. Educational curriculum also moved, carried by the CS50 introduction to AI lecture series.

cited_items.title: This NEW NotebookLM Update Changes Everything
